points.text: Practice good personal hygiene, including regular hand washing and avoiding touching the face.
Use face masks or coverings in public to reduce transmission risk.
Maintain physical or social distancing to prevent virus spread.
Ensure proper ventilation of indoor spaces to reduce airborne virus concentration.
Stay up to date with COVID-19 vaccinations to reduce infection risk.
Stay up to date on your COVID-19 vaccine to prevent serious illness and death.
Maintain good indoor airflow to help prevent the spread of the virus.
Practice physical distancing and wear a mask in appropriate settings.
Wash your hands well and often with soap and water for at least 20 seconds.
Avoid close contact with anyone who is sick or has COVID-19 symptoms.
Avoid crowded places and maintain at least 1 metre distance from others.
Wear a mask in public places where there is community transmission.
Wash hands frequently with soap and water or use an alcohol-based hand rub.
Ensure all indoor spaces are well ventilated.
Get vaccinated and continue measures to reduce virus spread.
